name: sparks-core
description: Multi-module monorepo of pipeline libraries for sparkwing - each module versioned independently
author: sparkwing

modules.description: Shared step-banner + error-wrapped shell helpers used across the other modules
AWS profile-flag resolution and IRSA detection
Docker build, push, multi-registry tagging, ECR auth, registry detection
S3 static-site deployment with cache-header conventions
Kubernetes deploy helpers (kubectl, kustomize)
GitOps deployment with kustomize patching, retry, and ArgoCD sync
Deploy orchestrator: routes to gitops+ArgoCD (cluster) or kubectl (local)
Rollback dispatcher: kubectl rollout undo (local/kind) or gitops revert + ArgoCD sync (remote)
Database schema migrations via the golang-migrate CLI (up, down, force)
Ephemeral Docker service containers (Postgres, ...) for integration tests
Post deploy/run notifications to an HTTP webhook (Slack-style or arbitrary JSON)
Pre-commit checks: formatting, linting, trailing newlines
HTTP health probes for post-deploy verification; Check feeds sparkwing Job.Verify, with unhealthy-vs-indeterminate classification
High-level pipeline primitives: DockerDeploy, StaticDeploy, NextJSBuild
Curated pipeline template registry: deterministic starters consumed by sparkwing pipeline new --template
GCP project/auth resolution and Workload Identity detection, twin of the aws module
Cloud Run deploy, traffic shifting, URL discovery, and rollback via gcloud
ECS/Fargate task-definition rollout, wait-for-stable, and rollback
AWS Lambda deploys (container image and zip), version publish, alias shift and rollback
Release and publish helpers: version gating, changelog parsing, checksums, GitHub/npm/PyPI publish flows
Content-addressed cache keys and skip predicates for path-scoped work
Coverage report parsing (Go coverprofile, lcov, cobertura) and threshold gating
Terraform init, plan-to-saved-file, apply-saved-plan, and change summaries
Database dump, backup upload, and restore helpers for scheduled backups and restore drills
